pageContext.name: Clone Pilot
pageContext.description: During the Republic era, Clone Troopers™ were selected to be trained to become pilots to fly a variety of ships for the Clone army. In the battle of Geonosis™, they flew Republic Attack Gunships to support the Jedi™ in the fight with the Separatists.  To celebrate the 20th anniversary of Star Wars: Attack of the Clones™, Sideshow and Hot Toys are delighted to introduce a series of Star Wars collectibles based on this landmark film for fans!  The new Clone Pilot Sixth Scale Collectible Figure features a specialized Clone Pilot helmet, an interchangeable Clone Pilot helmet, a detailed armor with weathering effects, two styles of blasters, a pair of binoculars, thermal detonators, and a figure base!  Add another member of the clone army to your Star Wars collection today!
